SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment

Class OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment.OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor extends Object implements Serializable
Monthly weighted oil-in-water compliance monitor for produced-water discharge.

The monitor accumulates oil mass and water volume from time-weighted or batch samples, computes the weighted monthly average, and estimates the remaining OIW budget for the rest of the month.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor

      public OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor()
      Creates a monthly monitor with a 30 mg/L limit.

  • Method Details

    • addSample

      public void addSample(double oilInWaterMgL, double waterVolumeM3)
      Adds an OIW sample weighted by discharged produced-water volume.
      Parameters:
      oilInWaterMgL - OIW concentration in mg/L
      waterVolumeM3 - produced-water volume represented by the sample in m3

    • getWeightedAverageMgL

      public double getWeightedAverageMgL()
      Calculates the weighted OIW average to date.
      Returns:
      weighted average in mg/L

    • calculateStatus

      public OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor.MonthlyStatus calculateStatus(int dayOfMonth)
      Calculates the monthly compliance status and remaining budget.
      Parameters:
      dayOfMonth - current day of month, starting at 1
      Returns:
      monthly status result

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Clears cumulative monthly data while preserving configuration.

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes monitor state and current status to JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON representation

    • calculateOilMassKg

      private double calculateOilMassKg(double oilInWaterMgL, double waterVolumeM3)
      Calculates oil mass from OIW and water volume.
      Parameters:
      oilInWaterMgL - OIW concentration in mg/L
      waterVolumeM3 - water volume in m3
      Returns:
      oil mass in kg

      private double calculateProjectedMonthlyWaterVolume(int dayOfMonth)
      Calculates projected monthly water volume.
      Parameters:
      dayOfMonth - current day of month
      Returns:
      projected monthly water volume in m3

    • determineStatus

      private OilInWaterMonthlyComplianceMonitor.ComplianceStatus determineStatus(double weightedAverage, double remainingAllowedAverage)
      Determines status from weighted average and remaining allowed average.
      Parameters:
      weightedAverage - weighted OIW average in mg/L
      remainingAllowedAverage - remaining allowed average in mg/L
      Returns:
